rules.name: Daily Water
rules.explanation: Base hydration plus activity and climate adjustments.

howItWorks.outro: Health metrics are general guidelines. Consult your healthcare provider for personalized medical advice.

faq.q: How much water should I drink daily?
faq.a: A good baseline is half your body weight in ounces, adjusted for activity and climate.
Yes, moderate caffeine intake still contributes to hydration despite mild diuretic effects.
